basic_details.job_title: BBSSL Deputy Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharatiya Beej Sahakari Samiti (BBSSL) Deputy Managing Director Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website of BBSSL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BBSSL Deputy Managing Director Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years. Relaxation in age may be considered for exceptionally qualified and experienced candidates at the discretion of the Competent Authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution, MBA / PGDM in Agribusiness, Operations, Supply Chain Management, Finance or Strategic Management
qualification.details: Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution. Desirable: MBA / PGDM in Agribusiness, Operations, Supply Chain Management, Finance or Strategic Management.

selection_process: demonstrated leadership capability Personal interaction before a duly constituted Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BBSSL Deputy Managing Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BBSSL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. BBSSL Deputy Managing Director Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline from a recognised University / Institution. Desirable: MBA / PGDM in Agribusiness, Operations, Supply Chain Management, Finance or Strategic Management.

content_sections.heading: BBSSL Deputy Managing Director Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years. Relaxation in age may be considered for exceptionally qualified and experienced candidates at the discretion of the Competent Authority.

content_sections.text: Evaluation of academic qualifications, relevant experience, demonstrated leadership capability Personal interaction before a duly constituted Selection Committee

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BBSSL Deputy Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BBSSL Deputy Managing Director post?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Deputy Managing Director post is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Managing Director position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate Degree in Agriculture, Agricultural Sciences, Agribusiness Management, Rural Management, Business Administration, Management or any allied discipline. An MBA/PGDM in specific fields is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Managing Director post is 58 years. Age relaxation may be considered for highly qualified and experienced candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the BBSSL Deputy Managing Director recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Deputy Managing Director role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an evaluation of academic qualifications, relevant experience, and demonstrated leadership capability, followed by a personal interaction with a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job opening?
faq.answer: The application process for the BBSSL Deputy Managing Director recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Managing Director post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Deputy Managing Director in Bharatiya Beej Sahakari Samiti (BBSSL).

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Deputy Managing Director position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the BBSSL located?
faq.answer: The Bharatiya Beej Sahakari Samiti (BBSSL) is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply if they are above 58 years of age?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 58 years. However, relaxation may be considered for exceptionally qualified and experienced candidates at the discretion of the Competent Authority.
